subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Adorn the crown of glory and submission with the ornament of unity and sanctification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی فودی عز و تسلیم را با عصاب توحید و تقدیس مزین نموده و بضحضاح
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @mystical themes, @nearness and remoteness, @light and darkness, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
